name: PAID INC
summary: PAID, Inc. (PAYD) operates two main business segments: ShipTime, an online platform enabling small and medium businesses to quote, process, generate labels, track, and dispatch courier and LTL freight shipments with discounted carrier rates across North America and globally; and PAID platform products (PaidPayment, PaidWeb, PaidCart, PaidShipping) offering e-commerce website building, multi-channel sales management, payment processing, and shipping solutions. The company serves over 109,300 members and generates revenue through transactions and SaaS offerings.

products.name: ShipTime
products.description: Online platform to quote, process, generate labels, track and dispatch courier and LTL freight shipments with discounted rates and multilingual customer support.

products.name: PaidWeb
products.description: Website builder offering templates, mobile editing, SEO tools, collaboration features, and multi-platform integration for small and medium businesses.

products.name: PaidCart
products.description: Multi-channel e-commerce sales management solution with currency/language management, promotional sales, and abandoned cart recovery.

products.name: PaidPayments
products.description: Online payment processing platform supporting virtual terminal, invoicing, subscriptions, checkout pages, and POS in USD, CAD, and EUR.

products.name: PaidShipping
products.description: Shipping solution to quote, process, generate labels, dispatch and track courier and LTL shipments with multi-courier comparison and eCommerce integrations.

partnerships.description: Long-standing partnerships with selected Canadian associations to sell ShipTime services to their members.
Secured convertible note investment of USD $1.5M (later extended with additional $500K) in this California corporation under a Securities Purchase Agreement.
